top_signals.title: Air France Could Consider Being Part of EasyJet Bid, CEO Says
top_signals.summary: In an interview at the IATA annual meeting in Rio de Janeiro, Air France-KLM CEO Benjamin Smith said the airline may need to raise ticket prices to compensate for rising fuel costs sparked by war in the Middle East. The carrier is also looking to reopen routes to the region when  it's safer. Smith signaled he’d be willing to consider becoming involved in a bid for EasyJet Plc.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GE Aerospace CEO Is Optimistic for More China Deals
top_signals.summary: In an interview at the IATA annual meeting in Rio de Janeiro, GE Aerospace CEO Larry Culp remained optimistic that GE could secure more aircraft-engine orders from China following a meeting between President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing the previous month, after which their manufacturing partner, Boeing Co. secured an initial batch of commitments. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: In trust’s name, disclose candidates’ prior citizenship
top_signals.summary: The issue is whether voters have the right to know the backgrounds of the people seeking to govern them. In any healthy democracy, the answer is yes.
